perks.summary: summarize an AnnData/single-cell file: shape, obs/var, layers, embeddings, raw-vs-normalized (read-only)
load any supported single-cell format (10x mtx dir/.h5, csv, loom, mtx) and write .h5ad
compute QC metrics, before/after plots, filter cells/genes, optional Scrublet doublet removal
normalize_total + log1p + highly-variable genes, optional scale/regress (keeps counts layer + raw)
PCA + variance plot, neighbors graph, UMAP, optional t-SNE
batch integration across samples: harmony / bbknn / combat
Leiden (or louvain) clustering at one or many resolutions on a precomputed graph
rank_genes_groups per group + per-group marker CSVs + marker plots (exploratory)
map clusters to cell-type labels from a JSON/CSV mapping; optional marker reference dotplot
score gene signatures (JSON) and/or cell-cycle phase, add per-signature obs columns
aggregate counts by sample x cell type into a genes x pseudobulk-sample matrix + metadata for pydeseq2
subset an AnnData by obs-column values (keep/drop) or by gene list, optionally clearing stale embeddings
end-to-end scRNA-seq pipeline in one command: load -> QC -> normalize -> HVG -> PCA -> (batch) -> UMAP -> Leiden -> markers
